emails.subject: MNF
emails.body: Errol, Have you heard of some spot near downtown called "luna mara" something. Supposed to be nice for MNF. Holla back Reggie Hit me up later, I lost your numbers ext 5-3815 8773195277@skytel.com 240-605-8505 Cell

emails.subject: MNF
emails.body: Errol, Have you heard of some spot near downtown called "luna mara" something. Supposed to be nice for MNF. Holla back Reggie Hit me up later, I lost your numbers ext 5-3815 8773195277@skytel.com 240-605-8505 Cell

emails.subject: RE: MNF
emails.body: RE: MNF Reggie, I heard there was a spot down here that was hot for MNF, but I don't know the name. I'm trying to find it now. I checked info for 'luna mara', but didn't find anything. I'll hit you back when I find it. My cell number is 713-870-8211, and my home is 713-528-1997. Errol To: McLaughlin Jr., Errol

emails.subject: RE: MNF
emails.body: just got w/ my source and she told me same thing. it's called luna mora. sound like a good spot. if you want to meet up there, I'm game. let me know what time. To: McLaughlin Jr., Errol

emails.subject: RE: MNF
emails.body: see ya' there To: McLaughlin Jr., Errol
